body.title: Cross-platform startup shim: superclaude + igor launchers
body.result: Built D232 startup shim: Linux/Mac (bash) + Windows (PowerShell) launchers with shared common functions, restart loop (exit 42), pause.wait semaphore, crash logging to alerts.txt, config validation, fresh-install wizard. All syntax validated. STARTUP_SHIM.md documentation created. Ready for integration.
body.description:
D232 finalized. Build cross-platform startup shim.
Linux/Mac: ~/bin/igor + ~/bin/superclaude (bash). Shared: ~/bin/_igor_common.sh.
Windows: %LOCALAPPDATA%\Microsoft\WindowsApps\igor.ps1 + superclaude.ps1. Shared: _igor_common.ps1.
Alerts file only (no Discord) — shown before dashboard, snooze deferred.
Responsibilities: restart loop (exit 42), pause.wait semaphore, pull-and-restart, force-savestate flag, crash logging.
Three required config values: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, IGOR_SWARM_DB_URL, IGOR_INSTANCE_ID.
superclaude: fresh-install wizard, requirements, CC version update — pauses Igor during setup.
Windows: elevated PS1 for Ollama/service management.
